allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName")
Bash(# Check if macOS has the app in notification center # Also check the notification authorization status plutil -p ~/Library/Preferences/com.apple.ncprefs.plist)
Bash(# Check if Focus/DND is active plutil -p ~/Library/DoNotDisturb/DB/Assertions.json)
Bash(# On newer macOS, notification settings are in a different location # Try to find any notification-related databases find ~/Library -name ""*.db"" -path ""*notification*"")

Bash(# Test departures on bahn.de API \(this is simpler and might work\) curl -s -w ""\\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}\\n"" ""https://int.bahn.de/web/api/reiseloesung/abfahrten?ortExtId=8000323&datum=2026-03-02&zeit=10:00&limit=3"" -H ""Accept: application/json"")

Bash(# Test the Transitous stoptimes \(departures\) endpoint curl -s -w ""\\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}\\n"" ""https://api.transitous.org/api/v1/stoptimes?stopId=de-DELFI_de:10041:8000323&n=3"" | python3 -m json.tool)

Bash(# Test Transitous stoptimes again with a simpler request curl -s -w ""\\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}\\n"" ""https://api.transitous.org/api/v1/stoptimes?stopId=de-DELFI_de:10041:8000323&n=3&arriveBy=false"")
